articles.title: Exile Vector
articles.description: After imprisoning Edmond Dantès to protect his political future and conceal his father’s ties to Bonapartists, Villefort rushes back to the Saint-Mérans and secretly prepares for a career-making trip to Paris. Mercédès desperately seeks answers but is turned away. Villefort briefly feels crushing guilt yet chooses ambition over justice. Meanwhile, Morrel fails to help, Danglars celebrates, Fernand waits beside Mercédès, and old Dantès suffers in helpless fear.

Best Usage-Based Billing Platforms for AI Companies in 2026: Metronome, Orb, Stripe, & Alternatives
articles.description: AI products break traditional SaaS billing because infrastructure costs happen before invoices are generated. This guide compares six usage-based billing platforms across real-time authorization, invoice-based metering, pricing flexibility, contracts, and self-hosting. Credyt leads for real-time balance debit, Metronome and Orb for enterprise billing, Lago for open source, and Stripe Billing and Chargebee for subscription-first models.

Joy Malignant is a photobashed, dice-based RPG where every choice you make affects how your faceless body looks
articles.description: The thing about Citizen Sleeper is that I wish there was more of it. Not literally, necessarily, I'd never want that world to be exhausted of its setting, and my imagination is stronger than any threequel or otherwise. Still, I'd like to play more of it because its inventive approach to digitising tabletop RPG design still feels fresh now. Thankfully, more and more games inspired by its structure are popping up, like Joy Malignant, another dice-based RPG where every choice you make affects how people see you. Read more

This guide explains how crypto debit, credit, and prepaid cards work, their fees and trade-offs, and breaks down the MEXC Card—a Visa crypto debit card funded by USDT. MEXC offers direct spending, up to 10% cashback in USDT, 7% APR on balances, and no annual fee.

articles.title: Why Local LLMs Suddenly Slow Down at Long Context
articles.description: Your local LLM runs fine until the context fills up past a certain point - then generation speed can drop by ~50%. The cause is the KV cache spilling out of VRAM into slower shared memory. On Windows it happens silently, with no out-of-memory error to warn you.

articles.title: AI Exposes the Quality of Your Thinking
articles.description: AI doesn't improve your thinking, it just reveals its quality. Clear thinkers use it to accelerate their work, while unfocused thinkers get polished nonsense. The real danger is letting AI take over your judgment, which is the one thing it can't automate. To stay sharp, use AI as a sparring partner to challenge your ideas, not as a replacement for having them.
